scripts.build:offline: vite build --config vite.offline.js && mkdir -p public/downloads dist/downloads && cp dist-offline/index.html public/offline.html && cp dist-offline/index.html public/downloads/CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.html && cp dist-offline/index.html dist/offline.html && cp dist-offline/index.html dist/downloads/CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.html && cd dist/downloads && zip -q -r CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.zip CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.html && cp CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.zip ../../public/downloads/CIMRA-Handbook-Offline.zip
scripts.native:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.native:android: npm run native:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.native:ios: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.native:android:release: npm run native:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.native:ios:archive: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
